name: rianell
description: Rianell — health dashboard (rianell.com); web app and React/Capacitor Android build

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:react
scripts.build:apk: npm run build:web:apk && npm run build:react
scripts.build:android: npm run build:apk && node scripts/prepare-android-assets.mjs && cd react-app && npx @capacitor/assets generate --android --iconBackgroundColor "#1a1d1e" --iconBackgroundColorDark "#0a0a0a" --splashBackgroundColor "#1a1d1e" --splashBackgroundColorDark "#0a0a0a" && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: cd react-app && npx cap open android
